title: Leading a Student Club [Part 1]: What Makes or Breaks a Team
description: This article summarizes all the things I've learnt about accountability, trust and culture in student clubs and things that worked for me (and my juniors) during my time as a technical club head
metaDescription: Leading a Student Club Series: Part 1 - What Makes or Breaks a Team. Anecdotes from leading a student club at IIT Madras, focusing on accountability and trust.
